source_takeaway: The source says AI can personalize learning and improve engagement, but schools must actively manage privacy, equity, and implementation quality.
student_note_takeaway: The note frames fluency as judgment over time, not dependence on one specific tool.
combined_insight: A durable AI fluency model should combine AI-assisted personalization with explicit practice in critical evaluation, policy awareness, and responsible use.
tension_or_assumption: A common assumption is that more AI access automatically creates fluency, when fluency actually depends on repeated reasoning practice and clear guardrails.
next_best_move: Run a two-week pilot where students submit one source and one short rationale, then compare claim/value/difference quality before and after guided refinement.
